mapper.select: SELECT id, product_type, model_name, color, hardness, base_qty, current_qty, location, last_in_date, last_out_date, created_at FROM item ORDER BY FIELD(product_type, 'TIRE', 'ARMOUR', 'TUBELESS'), id ASC
SELECT id, product_type, model_name, color, hardness, base_qty, current_qty, location, last_in_date, last_out_date, created_at FROM item WHERE product_type = #{productType} ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT id, product_type, model_name, color, hardness, base_qty, current_qty, location, last_in_date, last_out_date, created_at FROM item WHERE product_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR model_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR color LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR hardness LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT id, product_type, model_name, color, hardness, base_qty, current_qty, location, last_in_date, last_out_date, created_at FROM item WHERE product_type = #{productType} AND model_name = #{modelName} AND color = #{color} AND hardness = #{hardness} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE item SET current_qty = current_qty + #{qty}, last_in_date = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO item ( product_type, model_name, color, hardness, base_qty, current_qty, location, last_in_date ) VALUES ( #{productType}, #{modelName}, #{color}, #{hardness}, #{baseQty}, #{currentQty}, #{location}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT id, product_type, model_name, color, hardness, base_qty, current_qty, location, last_in_date, last_out_date, created_at FROM item WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE item SET current_qty = #{currentQty}, last_out_date = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT model_name FROM item WHERE product_type = #{productType} ORDER BY model_name ASC
SELECT id, product_type, model_name, color, hardness, base_qty, current_qty, location, last_in_date, last_out_date FROM item WHERE product_type = #{productType} AND model_name = #{modelName} LIMIT 1
